headline: TotalEnergies Expands Eastern Mediterranean Gas Exposure As Valuation Looks Compelling
summary: TotalEnergies signed a memorandum of understanding with Egyptian Natural Gas Holding Company to assess deep offshore gas prospects in northwestern Egypt. The company also agreed to technical and commercial cooperation on Syria's offshore Block 3 with Syrian Petroleum Company, QatarEnergy and ConocoPhillips. These agreements expand TotalEnergies' upstream exposure in the Eastern Mediterranean at a time when Egypt is seeking to address production trends and Syria is reopening to foreign...

headline: Assessing ConocoPhillips (COP) Valuation After Greater Ekofisk Redevelopment And Offshore Syria Exploration Moves
summary: ConocoPhillips (COP) is back in the headlines after Norway approved redevelopment plans for the Greater Ekofisk area and the company signed an offshore exploration MoU offshore Syria with regional partners. See our latest analysis for ConocoPhillips. The recent Greater Ekofisk approval and offshore Syria MoU come after a strong run, with ConocoPhillips delivering a year to date share price return of 23.03% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 33.35%, while the 5 year total shareholder...
